return(function(h,q,e,V,R,K,U,k,H,E,P,w,x,Z,a,i,r,D,L,b,n,g)n,b,a,Z,L,x,H,w,D,E,g,i,P,r,k=function(h,J)local q=g(J)local e=function(e,V,R,K,U,Z,b)return w(h,{e,V,R,K;U,Z;b},J,q)end return e end,{},function(h,J)local q=g(J)local e=function(...)return w(h,{...},J,q)end return e end,{},function(h)local J,w=949307-949306,h[-410456+410457]while w do
